characters.name: Player Character
characters.description: The main controllable character. Moves around the isometric grid using tap-to-move, harvests resources, constructs buildings, and raids enemy kingdoms. Their specific title changes based on the selected historical Era.

characters.name: Citizen
characters.description: Non-playable characters (NPCs) that spawn randomly on the map. They use A* pathfinding algorithms to wander around the kingdom autonomously, avoiding buildings and obstacles.

characters.name: King Ravana
characters.description: Controls a level 1 enemy base located near the borders. The player can attack his base to raid and steal up to 200 Gold.

characters.name: Lord Pandya
characters.description: Controls a level 2 enemy base. A tougher kingdom that the player can attack to raid up to 300 Gold.

characters.name: Chief Yodha
characters.description: Controls a level 3 enemy base. The player can attack his base to raid up to 250 Gold.

characters.name: Cow / Deer
characters.description: Animated wildlife that populate the map. The player can interact with them to hunt and gather Food resources.
